response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (16.7%) is below your own minimum threshold (0.30); sharing now risks cascading depletion in islanded mode, especially given prior ineffective transfers to chronically low peers.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r2c3. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via owner circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC 16.7% and declining at 1 kW load. Neighbors r3c5 and r4c4 show chronic low-SoC; prior sharing accelerated own depletion without stabilizing them. Strict hold on all outbound energy until SoC recovers above 0.30 or grid reconnects. Owner-circle requests (r2c3) monitored but deferred unless marked critical..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
